channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Ubisoft Buyout Rumors Heat Up: What's Next for the Gaming Giant?
item.description: Ubisoft facing takeover rumors, considering buyout led by Tencent and Guillemot family
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: Murder trial of tech consultant in death of Cash App founder Bob Lee begins
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The murder trial of a tech consultant in the stabbing death of Cash App founder Bob Lee begins Monday, a year and a half after the widely admired entrepreneur was found staggering on a deserted downtown San Francisco street seeking help.
item.dc:creator: JANIE HAR, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Excel basics: Get started with charts and sparklines
item.description: Microsoft Excel offers a plethora of tools for representing your data visually. The most basic of these — and arguably the most useful — is the humble chart. But it’s not always easy to know where to begin with charts. We’re here to help.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Aquona digitaliza sus operaciones en Castilla y León mediante la herramienta DROP
item.description: En el marco del proceso de transformación digital que está ejecutando Aquona, empresa responsable de la gestión del agua en más de 60 municipios de Castilla y León, se ha procedido a digitalizar la totalidad de sus operaciones dando un paso adelante en la mejora de la planificación de los trabajos y
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Volunteers bring solar power to Hurricane Helene's disaster zone
item.description: Nearly two weeks after Hurricane Helene downed power lines and washed out roads all over North Carolina's mountains, the constant din of a gas-powered generator is getting to be too much for Bobby Renfro.
item.dc:creator: GABRIELA AOUN ANGUEIRA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: This 3D-printed Texas hotel is shaking up the construction industry
item.description: The Vulcan is Icon's massive 3D printer, which stands 15½ feet tall and weighs 4.75 tons. It's capable of creating buildings with 12-foot-high curving walls.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How schools are tackling misinformation as false claims about hurricanes, election run wild
item.description: Schools face challenges teaching children how to identify and handle misinformation without getting political, especially in recent days as false claims swirl surrounding the recent hurricanes and the upcoming election.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, The Hill

item.title: Robinhood cofounder Baiju Bhatt wants to create the Starlink of solar power
item.description: It’s been seven months since Robinhood cofounder Baiju Bhatt entered stealth mode. Last March, he left his CCO perch at the online brokerage valued at $23 billion to quietly shift gears.
item.dc:creator: Susan Karlin, Fast Company

item.title: What's behind the northern lights that dazzled the sky farther south than normal
item.description: The latest solar storm has triggered northern lights farther south than normal including into parts of Germany, the United Kingdom, New England and New York City.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Ben Horowitz’s dual support for Trump and Harris says a lot about the Valley’s AI politics
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. I’m Mark Sullivan, a senior writer at Fast Company, covering emerging tech, AI, and tech policy.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: North Carolina maker of high-purity quartz back operating post-Helene
item.description: SPRUCE PINE, N.C. (AP) — One of the two companies that manufacture high-purity quartz used for making semiconductors and other high-tech products from mines in a western North Carolina community severely damaged by Hurricane Helene is operating again.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Cisco revamps key DevNet sandboxes
item.description: Cisco has expanded its DevNet sandbox environments to make it easier for network professionals to test and develop applications for key enterprise networking technologies.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Elon Musk unveils Tesla's 'Cybercab,' plans to bring autonomous driving tech to other models in 2025
item.description: Tesla unveiled its long-awaited robotaxi at a Hollywood studio Thursday night, though fans of the electric vehicle maker will have to wait until at least 2026 before they are available.
item.dc:creator: Tom Krisher, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Volunteers at Concordia Cemetery use technology to unearth Buffalo history
item.description: "We're going to be looking for and bringing up some of the tombstones that have sunk or have been buried," said Bonnie Fleischauer, Concordia Cemetery's public information officer.
item.dc:creator: Kayleigh Hunter-Gasperini, NewsNation

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Creepy yet helpful robot is ready to assist
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: American Water cyberattack renews focus on protecting critical infrastructure
item.description: CAMDEN, N.J. (AP) — A cyberattack continues to affect the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the United States, renewing a focus on the importance of protecting critical infrastructure sites.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SHIPKOWSKI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US considers asking court to break up Google as it weighs remedies in the antitrust case
item.description: The U.S. Department of Justice is considering asking a federal judge to break up Google after its ubiquitous search engine was declared an illegal monopoly, but it is just one of many possible remedies under review, according to a court filing.
item.dc:creator: SHAWN CHEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Google loses final EU court appeal against 2.4 billion euro fine in antitrust shopping case
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Google lost its final legal challenge on Tuesday against a European Union penalty for giving its own shopping recommendations an illegal advantage over rivals in search results, ending a long-running antitrust case that came with a whopping fine.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: States sue TikTok, alleging platform harms kids' mental health
item.description: The social media platform is accused of deploying "manipulative features" to keep young users hooked.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, NewsNation

item.title: WebSockets under the hood with Node.js
item.description: WebSockets is a network communication protocol that enables two-way client-server communication. WebSockets are often used for applications that require instantaneous updates, using a persistent duplex channel atop HTTP to support real-time interactions without constant connection negotiation.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Electron vs. Tauri: Which cross-platform framework is for you?
item.description: If there’s one thing developers agree on about cross-platform applications, it’s that it’s easier to create a GUI with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript than to use one of the many cross-platform frameworks out there. Frameworks like Electron give you the best of both worlds.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: iPhone update allows users to text for help when there's no cell service
item.description: The new update allows users to connect their phones to satellite, as long its an iPhone 14 or later model running iOS18.
item.dc:creator: Kaycee Sloan, NewsNation

item.title: TikTok is designed to be addictive to kids and causes them harm, US states' lawsuits say
item.description: More than a dozen states and the District of Columbia filed lawsuits against TikTok on Tuesday, saying that the popular short-form video app is designed to be addictive to kids and harms their mental health.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A close call with crafty scammer posing as Microsoft support
item.description: This scam uses Google search results to redirect you to scammers instead of Microsoft support. Here's what tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson has to say.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Databricks says with its new Databricks Apps platform, you can build tailored enterprise apps in 5 minutes
item.description: Every enterprise today is looking to get as much as possible out of its data and AI investments. But when building in-house apps, developers can struggle with infrastructure constraints and maintenance, security, data governance, compliance, and other issues.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: California’s vetoed AI bill: Bullet dodged, but not for long
item.description: Artificial intelligence has the power to revolutionize industries, drive economic growth, and improve our quality of life. But like any powerful, widely available technology, AI also poses significant risks.
item.dc:creator: Info World
